name: Millman National Land Services
description: Provides ALTA/NSPS Land Title Surveys, property boundary surveys, and development planning with over 20 years of experience. Serves Kansas City, St. Louis, Springfield, Columbia, and Independence.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: They're friendly, with a can-do, will-do attitude. They're always trying to make sure we're a satisfied customer.
They're available and enthusiastic about the work they do. That is peace of mind for us.
We were thoroughly impressed with Millman during the Burger King transaction and will be sure to keep Millman in mind for future transactions.

sentiment.summary: Millman National Land Services has an overwhelmingly positive reputation, praised by major clients for friendly service, reliable staff, professionalism, and customer satisfaction across multiple large-scale projects.
